text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: MMLEADS │ August 2021 │ V 1.0 41 

MDCD_OT_MC_CAPTD_SPEND 

LABEL: Medicaid Managed Care Capitated Payment Amount— Other Services 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the total Medicaid payment amount from all Other Services (OT) claims for capitated 
payments for the beneficiary during the year. 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: T-MSIS Other Services Claims file (derived) 

VALUES: $ 

COMMENT: CCW calculates this variable as the sum of all MDCD_PD_AMT from
